bank.retain_mission: Extract data-consolidation, document-generation, and report-distribution workflow decisions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about data sources, document templates, distribution channels, and recurring quality issues. Ignore individual run logs.

mental_models.name: Automation Flows
mental_models.source_query: Which automation flows are in production? Include inputs, outputs, schedules, and owners.

mental_models.name: Quality & Failures
mental_models.source_query: What quality issues recur in consolidation/generation/distribution, and what guards have helped?
